name: Roger's Scallop Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the coral from the bodies of the scallops.
2. Chop the garlic and fry it in a little oil until done, but not browned.
3. Add the scallop corals briefly to cook them just until done.
4. Blend the contents of the pan with the cream cheese, preferably in a blender, until very smooth.
5. Season with salt and pepper, then add some lemon juice to taste.
6. Place a small amount of the cheese mixture into each pastry case.
7. Slice each scallop into two or three disks about 0.5 cm thick and marinate them for about 10 minutes in lemon juice.
8. Lightly fry the scallops and place them on the pastry cases.
9. Decorate with caviar.
10. Serve immediately.
This is absolutely delicious and makes a nice light starter or an amuse-bouche for a longer meal.
